The '''underslung rotary blaster carbine''' was an unusually-designed [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]] with a handle mounted on top of its rotating [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]]. It used multiple [[galven coil]]s to prevent overheating at high rates of fire. It was fired from the hip and was not very accurate, but it did provide a steady stream of fire.
